title: Formal message basics
subtitle: Sound polite in simple writing.
overview: Use usted forms for formal messages.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: I would like to ask for information.

items.es: Buenos días, quisiera pedir información sobre el curso.
items.en: Good morning, I would like to ask for information about the course.

items.es: ¿Podría decirme el horario y el precio?
items.en: Could you tell me the schedule and the price?

items.es: También quisiera saber si hay clases por la tarde.
items.en: I would also like to know if there are afternoon classes.
Thank you very much for your help.
